description: Accounts in Arabic which mention kuruş as a form of payment (via ق symbol in second column) which helps to date this fragment as eighteenth- or nineteenth-century. The Ottoman kuruş did not appear widely in circulation until 1703. MCD.
tags: 18th or 19th c, numismatic dating, Arabic script
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
